name: Isekai'd to a Futanari World; a Futa Only Land - RPG [DependentPOV]
description:
Oh no, you died!

Oh yes, you will be send to a new world! Ah, Dandelonia! A medieval fantasy world with magic and everything cool that would certainly make a weeb make their pants wet.

"By the way, Dandelonia is a futa-only world. There's only girls with cocks there. Why? Hahahaha... I wanted it. If my older sis and bro can do their own versions, why don't I too?"

Said the arrogant and smug goddess that reincarnated you. She's doing all of that out of spite.

Good thing, though, she gave you some options beforehand!

Will you immerse yourself into a very big adventure?

This is a Futanari counterpart to the other previous two bots, out of the request of the user @Chamelllemon.
creator: Riley_the_TF_Creator
